title: Amtech D0929 Ratchet Non-Marking Durable 9-inch Spring Clamp, 75mm Max Jaw Opening, Soft Grip Handle
features: Use for: The Amtech D0929 Ratchet Clamp is essentially used for setting and securing a range of workpieces without marking and it’s also viable for professional use.
Body: The spring clamp has a durable reinforced polypropylene construction.
Jaw Opening: The maximum limit of jaw opening is 75mm (3”)
Clamp Pads: It has non-marking swivel clamp pads to protect workpieces
Handle: It has a soft-grip handle that provides greater comfort.
description: Product Description The Amtech Ratchet Clamp is constructed from reinforced polypropylene which makes this 9-inch (225mm) spring clamp quite durable. It is fitted with non-marking swivel clamp pads to protect workpieces and it also has a soft grip handle for greater comfort during use. The jaws can be opened to a maximum of 75mm (3 inches). Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your hand tool requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
